name: search_book
docstring:
Tìm kiếm sách theo tên sử dụng OpenAlex API.
Kết quả trả về danh sách các sách với thông tin cơ bản.

name: search_books
docstring: Endpoint 1: Search for books by name using the Open Library Search API.

name: get_ecampus_pricing
docstring: Endpoint 2: Retrieve eCampus pricing for a given ISBN.

name: search_ecampus_by_title
docstring:
Endpoint 3: Search for a book by title, get its ISBN from Open Library,
then fetch pricing from eCampus.

name: get_openlibrary_availability
docstring: Endpoint 4: Retrieve Open Library availability information for a given ISBN.

name: compare_book_providers
docstring:
Search all provider query APIs, attach source metadata to the first result from each,
then fetch provider-specific details and return the lowest-cost provider.

name: parse_pdf
docstring: Upload a PDF, extract text, send text to OpenAI, and return a JSON array of books.

name: analyze_syllabus
docstring:
Upload a PDF syllabus, extract books and schedule information,
and return rental timing recommendations per book.

name: chat_study_plan
docstring: Generate a personalized study and textbook access strategy from syllabus analysis and user context.
